description: Executable test scripts for district and school builders. All tests run without Playwright/browser (static Node.js analysis).

tests.name: structural-checks-district.js
tests.description: Validates district builder HTML/JS cross-references, syntax, element IDs, onclick handlers, step completeness, and cross-file variable references.
tests: Syntax validation across 11 JS files
All getElementById references exist (static checks)
All onclick handlers exported to window
All 14 steps have content divs and sidebar entries
Cross-file variable references (planState)
tests.coverage: Covers P0 test requirements: TEST-001, TEST-004, TEST-007

tests.name: structural-checks-school.js
tests.description: Validates school builder HTML/JS cross-references, syntax, element IDs, onclick handlers, step completeness, cross-file variables, and dynamic goal modal creation.
tests: Syntax validation across 3 JS files
All getElementById references exist (static checks)
All onclick handlers exported to window
All 12 steps have content divs and sidebar entries
Cross-file variable references (GOAL_AREAS_DB, ESSA_EVIDENCE_TIERS, NAMED_PROGRAMS_DB, STATE_ESSA_CONFIG)
Dynamic ID creation for goal modals
tests.coverage: Covers P0 test requirements: TEST-003, TEST-006, TEST-021, TEST-022

tests.name: budget-math-checks.js
tests.description: Validates budget calculation structure, funding sources, functions, window exports, feasibility weights, and budget containers.
tests: FUNDING_SOURCES array has 12 expected sources
Key budget functions exist (renderBudgetSetup, recalculateBudgetTotals, etc.)
Required functions exported to window
Feasibility score weights sum to 1.0
Budget container IDs exist in HTML
Budget calculation and validation logic present
tests.coverage: Covers P0 test requirements: TEST-023, TEST-024

tests.name: duplicate-function-checks.js
tests.description: Scans all district builder JS files for duplicate function definitions. Specifically validates critical duplicates: calculateFeasibilityScore and updateBudgetSummary.
tests: Full codebase scan for duplicate function definitions
Critical function audit: calculateFeasibilityScore (ai-engine.js vs budget-integration.js)
Critical function audit: updateBudgetSummary (budget-alignment.js vs budget-tracker.js)
Function signature consistency checks
tests.coverage: Covers P0 test requirements: TEST-011, TEST-012 (duplicate function resolution)

knownIssues.note: Two different implementations with different signatures. ai-engine.js takes planState parameter, budget-integration.js does not.
Two different implementations causing budget summary display inconsistencies.

tests.name: school-goal-modal-checks.js
tests.description: Validates school builder goal modal elements. Tests for 8 missing goal-related DOM IDs that are referenced in school.js but absent from index.html (static or dynamic).
tests: Static HTML contains goal modal IDs: goalBuilderModal, goalAreaAddModal, goalStatement, goalNeed, goalRootCause, goalMetric, goalTarget, goalDate
Dynamic element creation patterns in school.js for missing IDs
Modal-related functions exist: openGoalModal, closeGoalModal, saveGoal, editGoal, deleteGoal, addGoalArea
Form field references in goal creation code
Modal display/hide logic and event handlers
tests.coverage: Covers P1 test requirements: TEST-021 (goal creation modal), TEST-022 (goal area add modal)

knownIssues.description: Modal container for goal building - might be created dynamically
Modal for adding new goal areas

executionInstructions.all: cd /sessions/sleepy-gifted-allen/mnt/site/qa/20260330-223842/tests && for f in structural-checks-district.js structural-checks-school.js budget-math-checks.js duplicate-function-checks.js school-goal-modal-checks.js; do echo '=== Running '$f' ===' && node $f || true; done

outputFiles.structural-results-district.json: Test results for district builder structure validation
outputFiles.structural-results-school.json: Test results for school builder structure validation
outputFiles.budget-results.json: Test results for budget math and calculations
outputFiles.duplicate-results.json: Test results for duplicate function detection (includes detailed conflict report)
outputFiles.goal-modal-results.json: Test results for school builder goal modal elements

summary.p0Coverage: 11 P0 tests mapped (initialization, navigation, duplicate functions)
summary.p1Coverage: 20 P1 tests partially covered (structural validation for missing DOM, goal CRUD prep, budget checks)
summary.staticAnalysisOnly: No Playwright/browser required. All tests use Node.js file I/O and regex parsing.
summary.notes: These scripts validate code structure, syntax, and cross-references. They cannot test actual runtime behavior (step navigation, form interactions, data persistence) which requires Playwright/browser automation. Run these first as a quick gate check before moving to functional/integration tests.
